ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
- 3.11.* *_cpython
- 3.12.* *_cpython
- 3.13.* *_cp313
- 3.14.* *_cp314
python_impl:
- cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: SWIG interface for the LDAS Tools generic library

name: ldas-tools-ldasgen-swig

about.summary: SWIG interface for the LDAS Tools generic library
SWIG interface for the LDAS Tools generic library

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: ldas-tools-ldasgen-swig
  version: 2.6.11
  # dependency versions
  swig_version: 3.0.7
  ldas_tools_cmake_version: 1.3.1
  ldas_tools_al_swig_version: 2.6.11
  ldas_tools_ldasgen_version: 2.7.4

recipe:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://software.igwn.org/sources/source/${{ name }}-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: e885b7d195da9f4048ecd265b6cb343818724ece4ea292c5c978d2035e7fa612

build:
  number: 0
  skip:
    - win

outputs:
  - package:
      name: ldas-tools-ldasgen-swig
    build:
      script: build
      skip:
        - win
    requirements:
      build:
        - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
        - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
        - cmake >=3.6
        - make
        - pkg-config
        - swig >=${{ swig_version }}
      host:
        - ldas-tools-cmake >=${{ ldas_tools_cmake_version }}
        - ldas-tools-ldasgen ${{ ldas_tools_ldasgen_version }}.*
    tests:
      - package_contents:
          include:
            - genericAPI/LDASlogging.i

  - package:
      name: python-ldas-tools-ldasgen
    build:
      script:
        file: build-python.sh
      skip:
        - python_impl != 'cpython'
        - win
    requirements:
      build:
        - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
        - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
        - cmake >=3.20
        - make
        - pkg-config
        - swig >=${{ swig_version }}
      host:
        - ldas-tools-cmake >=${{ ldas_tools_cmake_version }}
        - ldas-tools-ldasgen ${{ ldas_tools_ldasgen_version }}.*
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('ldas-tools-ldasgen-swig', exact=True) }}
        - python
      run:
        #- ldas-tools-ldasgen >={{ ldas_tools_ldasgen_version }}
        - python
        - python-ldas-tools-al >=${{ ldas_tools_al_swig_version }}
      ignore_run_exports:
        by_name:
          - ldas-tools-ldasgen
    tests:
      - python:
          imports:
            - LDAStools.LDASlogging
    about:
      summary: Python bindings for the LDAS Tools generic library

about:
  summary: SWIG interface for the LDAS Tools generic library
  homepage: https://wiki.ligo.org/Computing/LDASTools
  repository: https://git.ligo.org/computing/ldastools/LDAS_Tools.git
  documentation: https://computing.docs.ligo.org/ldastools/LDAS_Tools/ldas-tools-ldasgen/
  license: GPL-3.0-or-later
  license_file: COPYING

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - duncanmmacleod
    - emaros
